lines.speaker: Amma
lines.text: Oh, yes. Sorry, I've just been sent over to collect some of Elder Degga's things. She passed away a few days ago.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry to hear that.

lines.speaker: Amma
lines.text: It's okay. Elder Coco is showing me how to make a remembrance basket. We weave them specially and fill them with things that were important to the one who's gone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In that case, I'll leave you to it. Sorry for disturbing you.
